name: Creole Beef Marinade (for Beef Steaks and Roasts)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients well.
2. Add meat to the marinade and marinate for up to 12 hours in the refrigerator.
3. Remove the meat from the marinade and pat dry with paper towels.
4. Place the meat in a smoker and smoke using your preferred fuel.
5. Cook the meat using your favorite method, lightly brushing the marinade on the surface while cooking.
